LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HERMAN KUMAR'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE IN ITS ENTIRETY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Action In Its Entirety
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HERMAN KUMAR's Motion To Dismiss Action In Its Entirety.

Plaintiff Herman Kumar's motion to dismiss action without prejudice in its entirety is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
